memoryArtifacts.headline: Big Discrepency
memoryArtifacts.description: Margaret de Venoix and Gilbert "The Marshall" Giffard are listed as having the same parents.  This creates a big, big problem

zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaret de Venoix於1083年11月5日出生在法國諾門迪卡爾瓦多斯時，她的父親Geoffrey 'le Marshall' de Venoix11080歲，母親Aline Pipard23歲。她和Gilbert the Marshall至少有2個兒子。她去世於大約1119年在威爾士布洛可爾布洛可享年37歲。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

en.lifeSummary: When Margaret de Venoix was born on 5 November 1083, in Calvados, Normandy, France, her father, Geoffrey 'le Marshall' de Venoix, was 11080 and her mother, Aline Pipard, was 23. She had at least 2 sons with Gilbert the Marshall. She died about 1119, in Pembroke, Pembrokeshire, Wales, at the age of 37.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margaret de Venoix est née le 5 novembre 1083, à Calvados, Normandie, France, son père, Geoffrey 'le Marshall' de Venoix, avait 11080 ans et sa mère, Aline Pipard, avait 23 ans. Elle a eu au moins 2 fils avec Gilbert the Marshall. Elle est décédée environ 1119, à Pembroke, Pembrokeshire, Galles, à l’âge de 37 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Margaret de Venoix am 5. November 1083 in Calvados, Normandie, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Geoffrey 'le Marshall' de Venoix 11080 und ihre Mutter Aline Pipard 23. Sie hatte mit Gilbert the Marshall mindestens 2 Söhne. Sie starb um 1119 im Alter von 37 Jahren in Pembroke, Pembrokeshire, Wales.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret de Venoix è nata il il 5 novembre 1083 nel Calvados, Normandie, Francia, sua padre, Geoffrey 'le Marshall' de Venoix, aveva 11080 anni e sua madre, Aline Pipard, aveva 23 anni. Lei avuto almeno 2 figli con Gilbert the Marshall. Morì circa 1119, nel Pembroke, Pembrokeshire, Galles, all'età di 37 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Margaret de Venoixが1083年11月5日にフランスノーマンディカルヴァドスで生まれた時，父Geoffrey 'le Marshall' de Venoixは11080歳，母Aline Pipardは23歳であった。彼女はGilbert the Marshallとの間に少なくとも2人の息子をもうけた。彼女は約1119年にウェールズペンブロケシュアイアペンブロクで37歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Margaret de Venoix(이)가 1083년 11월 5일 프랑스 노먼디 캘바도스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Geoffrey 'le Marshall' de Venoix(은)는 11080세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Aline Pipard(은)는 23세였다. 그녀는 Gilbert the Marshall(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1119년 웨일스 p브로케실르 p브로크에서 37세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret de Venoix nasceu em 5 de novembro de 1083, em Calvados, Normandie, França, seu pai, Geoffrey 'le Marshall' de Venoix, tinha 11080 anos e sua mãe, Aline Pipard, tinha 23 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 2 filhos com Gilbert the Marshall. Ela faleceu aproximadamente 1119, em Pembroke, Pembrokeshire, Gales, com 37 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margaret de Venoix родилась 5 ноября 1083 г. в местности калвадос, норманди, Франция, её отцу по имени Geoffrey 'le Marshall' de Venoix было 11080 лет, а матери, которую звали Aline Pipard, 23. У неё было по крайней мере 2 сына от Gilbert the Marshall. Она умерла около 1119 г. в местности пемброк, пемброкешир, Уэльс в возрасте 37 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Margaret de Venoix nació el 5 de noviembre de 1083, en Calvados, Normandie, Francia, su papá, Geoffrey 'le Marshall' de Venoix, tenía 11080 años y su mamá, Aline Pipard, tenía 23 años. Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijos con Gilbert the Marshall. Murió aproximadamente 1119, en Pembroke, Pembrokeshire, Gales, a la edad de 37 años.
